description: K487 forensic review and cleanup-needs triage

encoding_issues.cause: Orphan-process concurrent writes produced partial/split JSON lines

emoji_crash.event: CP1252 UnicodeEncodeError on unicode checkmark in summary banner
emoji_crash.fix: Remove emoji from print() calls in mining scripts
emoji_crash.also_affected: run_k487_post_mining.py banner was already fixed; phase_a_ledger_rebuild.py hit same issue and was patched

encoding_issues.encoding_policy: All Python scripts in this workspace should set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 or use sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8') at startup. Alternatively, avoid unicode emoji in stdout on Windows.

pdfs.reason: path.read_text() raises UnicodeDecodeError on binary PDF; caught by except Exception -> returns []
pdfs.triage: Architecture (defer): add PDF text extraction (pdfplumber/pymupdf) in K-future

docx.reason: Same: binary file; read_text() fails silently
docx.triage: Architecture (defer): add python-docx extraction in K-future

html.reason: read_text() succeeds but HTML tags become noisy keywords (tag names tokenize as words)
html.triage: Architecture (defer): add BeautifulSoup stripping before keyword extraction

images.reason: Binary; silently returns [] from read_text() except block

ram_pressure.observation: MAX_KEYWORD_POOL=2000 cap (K474 rule) applied per Miner; prevented OOM
ram_pressure.note: 201 Miners x 2000-word pools = max 402K total words in-memory at peak
ram_pressure.recommendation: Current cap is appropriate for 65GB corpus; re-evaluate if Miner count grows 5x

eta_accuracy.observation: ETA not tracked in K487 harness
eta_accuracy.recommendation: Add progress ETA to K-future harness based on files_processed/files_total rate

triage_table.status: RESOLVED — miner.py patched with FILENAME_STEM_PATTERNS filter

triage_table.finding: threading.Lock insufficient for cross-process concurrent writes
triage_table.status: RESOLVED — TS-022 written; primary fix: taskkill /F /T

FLAG — credits is a genuine high-density domain in Liana Banyan corpus (financial/cooperative credits are central platform concept). 73K cross-refs is expected given platform focus. Monitor: if >1M in K-future, investigate cross-reference threshold (currently 0.40).
DOCUMENTED — add pdfplumber + python-docx in K-future sprint

triage_table.finding: HTML files partially processed (tag noise in keywords)
triage_table.status: DOCUMENTED — add BeautifulSoup stripping in K-future

triage_table.finding: CP1252 encoding crash on emoji in print() calls
triage_table.status: RESOLVED — emoji removed from Phase A script; policy: use ASCII-safe output on Windows

triage_table.finding: No ETA tracking in mining harness
triage_table.status: DOCUMENTED — add progress ETA to K-future harness

triage_table.finding: MAX_KEYWORD_POOL=2000 cap causing keyword loss in high-density Miners
triage_table.status: DOCUMENTED — cap is appropriate for K487 scale; revisit if Miner count 5x grows
DOCUMENTED — Ghost Miner Catacombs disposition is the forward resolution; actual Miner-cap policy refinement is a Founder + Bishop design decision
